epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis of pruritic eczema; exclude scabies and fungal infections

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; dependent on emollient access and follow-up

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Diagnosis is clinical; specialist access varies widely
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Emollients and topical steroids; manage infection; advanced therapy mainly in tertiary/private settings
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Out-of-pocket costs for emollients and limited specialist access outside metros
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Topical steroids widely available and growing dermatology services in cities
